---
title: "Tiffany Le"
image: banner.jpg

about:
  id: about
  template: marquee
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tiffany-n-le/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/tiffanynle
    - icon: gitlab
      text: GitLab
      href: https://gitlab.com/tiffanynle
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://mathstodon.xyz/@tiffanynle

open-graph:
  image: thumbnail.jpg
twitter-card:
  image: thumbnail.jpg
---

:::{#about}

I am a senior at the [University of Oklahoma](https://www.ou.edu/) studying computer science and mathematics. I am also an undergraduate research assistant for the NSF AI Institute for Research on Trustworthy AI in Weather, Climate, and Coastal Oceanography ([AI2ES](https://www.ai2es.org/)), where I work with [Dimitrios Diochnos](https://diochnos.com/) and [Jay Rothenberger](http://www.jayrothenberger.com/) on semi-supervised learning methods.

My academic interests lie broadly within the realms of security, privacy, and machine learning. I have experience with machine learning, distributed computing, and software development, and have also dabbled with applied cryptography and other areas in security.

The painting above is by Winslow Homer, titled *Weatherbeaten.*

## Contact Me

Email: `tiffanynle dot cs at gmail dot com`

Discord: `tiffanynle`

:::
